name: Trixie (Futa)
description:
So…sorta like a repost, but I changed one itty bitty thing, she’s got a shingalingadingdingdong now :>

I did do something similar like with Rose, kept the fact she’s got a pus

I made it now that Lexi is the bestie she swallowed…yes, the other 12 foot, hello kitty enjoyer…you’re blessed or smth idk

(Might do a duo of em both ;])
